short_description: "Our Journeys 2 ~ A Collection of Visual Novels" is a collection of four stories in various genres.
detailed_description:
"Our Journeys 2 ~ A Collection of Visual Novels" is a collection of four stories in various genres.

Features
  • Several visual novels made with RPG Maker MV.

First Story : Ixelda / Shirina

Two short stories. Each one got two endings. 2.437 words.

In “Ixelda, the Cursed Queen”, Denis accidentally free her with her dark fairies. Now Ixelda want to conquer the world.

In “Shirina, the Witch”, Lita (full name Manolita) want her best friend Jes (full name Jesabel) to do a magic ritual with her. Said ritual should summon a witch.

Second Story : Hack the Core

Multiple ending story. 2.541 words.

Chiko is a VR hacker. When a mysterious being give him the mission to stop terrorists, he got work to do!

Third Story : Nuri Corruption

Multiple endings short story. 1k-ish words. Nuri need your help.

Hir is trapped in the dark version of the hotel ‘Lovers’ Eden’ and the Corruption is always present.

Fourth Story : Red or Blue?

Semi-kinetic story. 2k-ish words. Salieka is in love with Taralise since the day she saved her life.

Two cycles, two destinies, hate or pity.

Which one will be her's? YOU decide!

Approx. total word count: 7.928
